layers.name: NOAA/NWS Active Alerts
layers.notes: Use normalized hazards/alerts.geojson in the app where possible.

layers.name: EUMETSAT EUMETView WMS
layers.coverage: Europe, Africa, Atlantic and adjacent satellite sectors depending on product
layers.notes: Use only products/licences approved for the app; near-real-time products can require account/licence acceptance.

layers.name: Environment Canada Weather Alerts
layers.notes: Normalized into hazards/alerts.geojson by provider CANADA_MSC.

layers.name: Hong Kong Observatory Open Data
layers.notes: Warnings are normalized when active; warning endpoints can return an empty object during quiet periods.

layers.name: Singapore Two-hour Forecast
layers.notes: This is a forecast layer, not an official severe-warning feed.

layers.name: Japan Meteorological Agency Warnings
layers.notes: Normalized without polygons because the public warning feed provides area codes and names.

layers.name: NASA FIRMS Active Fires
layers.notes: Set FIRMS_MAP_KEY to include this layer in hazards/fires.geojson.

layers.name: Bureau of Meteorology Australia Warnings
layers.notes: Set this when a stable official or approved GeoJSON warning source is selected.

layers.name: Brazil INMET Alert-AS
layers.notes: Set this when a stable Alert-AS GeoJSON/CAP conversion endpoint is selected.

layers.name: Argentina Servicio Meteorologico Nacional Alerts
layers.notes: Set this when a stable official alerts endpoint is selected.

layers.name: India Meteorological Department Alerts
layers.coverage: India and North Indian Ocean products
layers.notes: Set this when an official or approved machine-readable feed is selected.

layers.name: DOST-PAGASA Alerts
layers.notes: Set this when an official or approved machine-readable feed is selected.

layers.name: Fiji Meteorological Service / RSMC Nadi
layers.notes: Set this when an official or approved machine-readable feed is selected.

layers.name: Joint Typhoon Warning Center
layers.coverage: Western Pacific, Indian Ocean, and Southern Hemisphere tropical cyclone products
layers.notes: Set this when an approved GeoJSON/KML conversion source is selected.
